book: THE GOSPEL ACCORDING TO ST. LUKE

verses.text: Then said he unto the disciples, \+w It is\+w* \+w impossible\+w* \+w but\+w* \+w that offences\+w* \+w will come\+w*: \+w but\+w* \+w woe\+w* \+add unto him\+add*, \+w through\+w* \+w whom\+w* \+w they come\+w*!

\+w It were better\+w* \+w for him\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w a millstone\+w* \+w were hanged\+w* \+w about\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w neck\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w he cast\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w the sea\+w*, \+w than\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w he should offend\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w of these\+w* \+w little ones\+w*.

¶ \+w Take heed\+w* \+w to yourselves\+w*: \+w If\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w brother\+w* \+w trespass\+w* \+w against\+w* \+w thee\+w*, \+w rebuke\+w* \+w him\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w if\+w* \+w he repent\+w*, \+w forgive\+w* \+w him\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w if\+w* \+w he trespass\+w* \+w against\+w* \+w thee\+w* \+w seven times\+w* \+w in a day\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w seven times\+w* \+w in a day\+w* \+w turn again\+w* \+w to\+w* \+w thee\+w*, \+w saying\+w*, \+w I repent\+w*; \+w thou shalt forgive\+w* \+w him\+w*.
And the apostles said unto the Lord, Increase our faith.

And the Lord said, \+w If\+w* \+w ye had\+w* \+w faith\+w* \+w as\+w* \+w a grain\+w* \+w of mustard seed\+w*, \+w ye might say\+w* \+w unto this\+w* \+w sycamine tree\+w*, \+w Be thou plucked up by the root\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w be thou planted\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the sea\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w it should obey\+w* \+w you\+w*.

\+w But\+w* \+w which\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w you\+w*, \+w having\+w* \+w a servant\+w* \+w plowing\+w* \+w or\+w* \+w feeding cattle\+w*, \+w will say\+w* \+w unto him\+w* \+w by and by\+w*, \+w when he is come\+w* \+w from\+w* \+w the field\+w*, \+w Go\+w* \+w and sit down to meat\+w*?

\+w And\+w* \+w will\+w* \+w not rather\+w* \+w say\+w* \+w unto him\+w*, \+w Make ready\+w* \+w wherewith\+w* \+w I may sup\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w gird thyself\+w*, \+w and serve\+w* \+w me\+w*, \+w till\+w* \+w I have eaten\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w drunken\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w afterward\+w* \+w thou\+w* \+w shalt eat\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w drink\+w*?
\+w Doth he\+w* \+w thank\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w servant\+w* \+w because\+w* \+w he did\+w* \+w the things that\+w* \+w were commanded\+w* \+w him\+w*? \+w I trow\+w* \+w not\+w*.

\+w So\+w* \+w likewise\+w* \+w ye\+w*, \+w when\+w* \+w ye shall have done\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w those things which\+w* \+w are commanded\+w* \+w you\+w*, \+w say\+w*, \+w We are\+w* \+w unprofitable\+w* \+w servants\+w*: \+w we have done\+w* \+w that which\+w* \+w was our duty\+w* \+w to do\+w*.
¶ And it came to pass, as he went to Jerusalem, that he passed through the midst of Samaria and Galilee.
And as he entered into a certain village, there met him ten men that were lepers, which stood afar off:
And they lifted up their voices, and said, Jesus, Master, have mercy on us.
And when he saw them, he said unto them, \+w Go\+w* \+w shew\+w* \+w yourselves\+w* \+w unto the priests\+w*. And it came to pass, that, as they went, they were cleansed.
And one of them, when he saw that he was healed, turned back, and with a loud voice glorified God,
And fell down on his face at his feet, giving him thanks: and he was a Samaritan.
And Jesus answering said, \+w Were there\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w ten\+w* \+w cleansed\+w*? \+w but\+w* \+w where\+w* \+add are\+add* \+w the nine\+w*?
\+w There are\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w found\+w* \+w that returned\+w* \+w to give\+w* \+w glory\+w* \+w to God\+w*, \+w save\+w* \+w this\+w* \+w stranger\+w*.
And he said unto him, \+w Arise\+w*, \+w go thy way\+w*: \+w thy\+w* \+w faith\+w* \+w hath made\+w* \+w thee\+w* \+w whole\+w*.

¶ And when he was demanded of the Pharisees, when the kingdom of God should come, he answered them and said, \+w The kingdom\+w* \+w of God\+w* \+w cometh\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w observation\+w*:

\+w Neither\+w* \+w shall they say\+w*, \+w Lo\+w* \+w here\+w*! \+w or\+w*, \+w lo\+w* \+w there\+w*! \+w for\+w*, \+w behold\+w*, \+w the kingdom\+w* \+w of God\+w* \+w is\+w* \+w within\+w* \+w you\+w*.

And he said unto the disciples, \+w The days\+w* \+w will come\+w*, \+w when\+w* \+w ye shall desire\+w* \+w to see\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w of the days\+w* \+w of the Son\+w* \+w of man\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w ye shall\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w see\+w* \+add it\+add*.

\+w And\+w* \+w they shall say\+w* \+w to you\+w*, \+w See\+w* \+w here\+w*; \+w or\+w*, \+w see\+w* \+w there\+w*: \+w go\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w after\+w* \+add them\+add*, \+w nor\+w* \+w follow\+w* \+add them\+add*.

\+w For\+w* \+w as\+w* \+w the lightning\+w*, \+w that lighteneth\+w* \+w out of\+w* \+w the one\+w* \+add part\+add* \+w under\+w* \+w heaven\+w*, \+w shineth\+w* \+w unto\+w* \+w the other\+w* \+add part\+add* \+w under\+w* \+w heaven\+w*; \+w so\+w* \+w shall\+w* \+w also\+w* \+w the Son\+w* \+w of man\+w* \+w be\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w day\+w*.
\+w But\+w* \+w first\+w* \+w must\+w* \+w he\+w* \+w suffer\+w* \+w many things\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w be rejected\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w this\+w* \+w generation\+w*.
\+w And\+w* \+w as\+w* \+w it was\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the days\+w* \+w of Noe\+w*, \+w so\+w* \+w shall it be\+w* \+w also\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the days\+w* \+w of the Son\+w* \+w of man\+w*.

\+w They did eat\+w*, \+w they drank\+w*, \+w they married wives\+w*, \+w they were given in marriage\+w*, \+w until\+w* \+w the day\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w Noe\+w* \+w entered\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w the ark\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w the flood\+w* \+w came\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w destroyed\+w* \+w them all\+w*.

\+w Likewise\+w* \+w also\+w* \+w as\+w* \+w it was\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the days\+w* \+w of Lot\+w*; \+w they did eat\+w*, \+w they drank\+w*, \+w they bought\+w*, \+w they sold\+w*, \+w they planted\+w*, \+w they builded\+w*;

\+w But\+w* \+w the same day\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w Lot\+w* \+w went\+w* \+w out\+w* \+w of Sodom\+w* \+w it rained\+w* \+w fire\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w brimstone\+w* \+w from\+w* \+w heaven\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w destroyed\+w* \+add them\+add* \+w all\+w*.
\+w Even\+w* \+w thus\+w* \+w shall it be\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the day\+w* \+w when\+w* \+w the Son\+w* \+w of man\+w* \+w is revealed\+w*.

\+w In\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w day\+w*, \+w he which\+w* \+w shall be\+w* \+w upon\+w* \+w the housetop\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w stuff\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the house\+w*, \+w let him\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w come down\+w* \+w to take\+w* \+w it\+w* \+w away\+w*: \+w and\+w* \+w he that is\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the field\+w*, \+w let him\+w* \+w likewise\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w return\+w* \+w back\+w*.
\+w Remember\+w* \+w Lot’s\+w* \+w wife\+w*.

\+w Whosoever\+w* \+w shall seek\+w* \+w to save\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w life\+w* \+w shall lose\+w* \+w it\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w whosoever\+w* \+w shall lose\+w* \+w his life\+w* \+w shall preserve\+w* \+w it\+w*.

\+w I tell\+w* \+w you\+w*, \+w in that\+w* \+w night\+w* \+w there shall be\+w* \+w two\+w* \+add men\+add* \+w in\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w bed\+w*; \+w the one\+w* \+w shall be taken\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w the other\+w* \+w shall be left\+w*.
\+w Two\+w* \+add women\+add* \+w shall be\+w* \+w grinding\+w* \+w together\+w*; \+w the one\+w* \+w shall be taken\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w the other\+w* \+w left\+w*.
Two \+add men\+add* shall be in the field; the one shall be taken, and the other left.

And they answered and said unto him, Where, Lord? And he said unto them, \+w Wheresoever\+w* \+w the body\+w* \+add is\+add*, \+w thither\+w* \+w will\+w* \+w the eagles\+w* \+w be gathered together\+w*.
